remaining_tasks.name: Spawn gsd-planner to create PLAN.md files

decisions.decision: D-01: Reuse unified integrations table with provider=typebot
decisions.rationale: Same encryption envelope pattern as Chatwoot

decisions.decision: D-02: Store multiple bot configs in encrypted JSON config envelope
decisions.rationale: One integration row per workspace, bots array inside

decisions.decision: D-03: Map bots to connection channels with trigger keywords + default fallback
D-04: Ignore trigger keywords during active sessions
decisions.rationale: User decided active sessions should not be interrupted

decisions.decision: D-05: Dedicated typebot_sessions table with composite PK (workspace_id, contact_id, connection_id)
decisions.rationale: One active session per contact per connection

decisions.decision: D-06: Hybrid flow — sync responses from startChat/continueChat + async webhook endpoint
D-07: POST /api/integrations/typebot secured with standard API key query param

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 22 to resume the planning pipeline. CONTEXT.md and RESEARCH.md are already committed — the pipeline will detect them and skip to pattern mapping + planner spawn.
context_notes: Phase 21 (Chatwoot Integration) was completed and verified (6/6 UAT passed). Phase 22 discussion captured 7 implementation decisions. Research completed covering Typebot API contract (startChat/continueChat), existing Chatwoot patterns to reuse, InboundProcessor hook point, typebot_sessions schema, and admin UI patterns. The pattern mapper subagent was spawned but killed before completion when user requested pause.
